items.content_html: An obsidian plugin to help review notes that have been taken

items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that automatically detects and corrects words with two initial capital letters followed by lowercase letters.
items.title: ibabichuk/double-capitalization-fix-obsidian: Obsidian plugin that automatically detects and corrects words with two initial capital letters followed by lowercase letters.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to paste contents of clipboard into a separate note, and embed the note in the current position.
items.title: mlprt/obsidian-paste-as-embed: Obsidian plugin to paste contents of clipboard into a separate note, and embed the note in the current position.

items.content_html: An Obsidian Plugin to allow for embeding and editing of code files within your markdown
items.title: GavinRigsby/obsidian-embed-and-edit-code: An Obsidian Plugin to allow for embeding and editing of code files within your markdown

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to create context-aware toolbars for your notes.
items.title: chrisgurney/obsidian-note-toolbar: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to create context-aware toolbars for your notes.

items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.
items.title: Aetherinox/obsidian-gistr: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that allows the user to add a tag to all files in a folder. Not in active development. Now working on Multi-Properties, which covers most of this plugin's functionality.
items.title: technohiker/obsidian-multi-tag: Obsidian plugin that allows the user to add a tag to all files in a folder.  Not in active development.  Now working on Multi-Properties, which covers most of this plugin's functionality.

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian that allows user to add properties to multiple notes at once.
items.title: technohiker/obsidian-multi-properties: Plugin for Obsidian that allows user to add properties to multiple notes at once.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that adds a stopwatch whose value can be pasted into the editor
items.title: hedgehog1833/obsidian-timetracker: Obsidian plugin that adds a stopwatch whose value can be pasted into the editor

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
